_comment: NIL athlete dataset. Figures are estimated 12-month NIL valuations based on public reporting and/or our model — not amounts paid. 'reported: true' means a public figure was cited (see source). Add athletes here and re-run `node scripts/build.js` to regenerate pages + sitemap. Keep data accurate: each page must offer real value to rank (avoid bulk/fabricated entries).

athletes.name: Arch Manning
athletes.blurb: The Texas quarterback and member of the Manning football dynasty holds the highest NIL valuation of any college athlete heading into 2026, driven by elite name recognition and a blue-chip program.

athletes.name: Jeremiah Smith
athletes.blurb: After a standout freshman season, the Ohio State receiver became the first college athlete on a Red Bull can and signed with Adidas, EA Sports, Nintendo and more — fueling a top-tier NIL valuation.

athletes.name: AJ Dybantsa
athletes.blurb: The BYU freshman phenom is among the highest-valued basketball players in the country, with a valuation rivaling the top college football stars.
